TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-sinobale_uma 2021s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: nii ka beras dhequy sinoun qsiya.
S.PHON: nii ka beɾas dħequj sinoun qsija.
S.FORM: nii ka beras dhequy sinoun qsiya.
S.PHON: nii ka beɾas dħequj sinoun qsija.
S.TRANSL: Firstly, wash sticky rice with water,

S.FORM: ma rebuun a ani naq Lsanjikang.
S.PHON: ma ɾebuun a ani naq lsanjikaŋ.
S.FORM: ma rebuun a ani naq Lsanjikang.
S.PHON: ma ɾebuun a ani naq lsanjikaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 接著將洗過的糯米浸泡在水中約三小時,
then soak the washed sticky rice into water for three hours.
After soaking sticky rice into water,
you use steaming box to steam the sticky rice.
you use fire to steam up.
After the sticky rice steamed well,
When the sticky rice cools down to room temperature,

TRANSL.notes: 就灑上酒麴(要攪拌均勻),
you put malted rice (it should be mixed evenly).

S.FORM: m a mhedusu tmamun de ubungunsu di ma kika.
S.PHON: m a mħedusu tmamun de ubuŋunsu di ma kika.
S.FORM: m a mhedusu tmamun de ubungunsu di ma kika.
S.PHON: m a mħedusu tmamun de ubuŋunsu di ma kika.

TRANSL.notes: 妳將糯米飯與酒麴混合均勻後,妳就把它蓋起來...那麼(接下來),

S.TRANSL: 妳將糯米飯與酒麴混合均勻後,妳就把它蓋起來...那麼 ,
After you mix the sticky rice and koji evenly, you cover it up, then,

TRANSL.notes: 過了三天(因酒麴發酵)糯米飯會發熱,

S.TRANSL: 過了三天 糯米飯會發熱,

TRANSL.notes: after three days (due to catalysis), sticky rice become heated.

S.TRANSL: after three days , sticky rice become heated.

S.FORM: ngalunsu du ma posaunsu salo di.
S.PHON: ŋalunsu du ma posaunsu salo di.
S.FORM: ngalunsu du ma posaunsu salo di.
S.PHON: ŋalunsu du ma posaunsu salo di.
S.TRANSL: 就把它放入容器 中.

TRANSL.notes: So, put it inside salo (a kind of container).

S.FORM: salo ma posaun qsiya di ma posaun biciq qsiya wa posaun betaq bale hini qsiya.
S.PHON: salo ma posaun qsija di ma posaun biʦiq qsija wa posaun betaq bale ħini qsija.
S.FORM: salo ma posaun qsiya di ma posaun biciq qsiya wa posaun betaq bale hini qsiya.
S.PHON: salo ma posaun qsija di ma posaun biʦiq qsija wa posaun betaq bale ħini qsija.

TRANSL.notes: (已發酵的糯米飯置入容器中時)加少許的水,只能加水到這裡,

S.TRANSL: 加少許的水,只能加水到這裡,

TRANSL.notes: (When you put steamed rice into a container), pour a little water, only up to here.

S.TRANSL: , pour a little water, only up to here.

S.FORM: kika gemuki di ma tikuh e.
S.PHON: kika gemuki di ma tikuħ e.
S.FORM: kika gemuki di ma tikuh e.
S.PHON: kika gemuki di ma tikuħ e.

S.FORM: ani naq a mkmaxan hari de malu di angali di.
S.PHON: ani naq a mkmaxan ħaɾi de malu di aŋali di.
S.FORM: ani naq a mkmaxan hari de malu di angali di.
S.PHON: ani naq a mkmaxan ħaɾi de malu di aŋali di.

TRANSL.notes: 約過了10天後..就(釀)好了,把它取出來,

S.TRANSL: 約過了10天後..就 好了,把它取出來,
after about ten days, it brews well, then take it out,
